hero.title: FRONTEND DEV AND COFFEE NERD
hero.description: about everything, reaching for fullstack. Looking to improve my skills one coffee at the time. All things

mission.title: MISSION
mission.content: Trained in front-end development, working across the full stack. With a solid background in human connection, structure and project management, I focus on delivering high-quality and make the complex simple.
mission.tagline: Helping people to succeed with digital products.

projects.title: Selected projects
projects.description: a bold statement and one of my main goals when building. I enjoy creating software that is easy to use, intuitive and solve problems.

dev.devSubtitle: Turning ideas into actual performant interfaces.
dev.devDescription: I enjoy building modern web applications, focusing on clarity, accessibility and consistency. My client facing background helps me translate real user needs into simple flows and clean components. I care about naming, structure and patterns that make it easy for others to read, extend and maintain the code.

coffee.coffeeDescPart1: Rocked the grinder behind the espresso machine, and brewed coffee for over a decade. Managed cafés in fast-paced environments, serving the people their daily dose of caffeine. Those years taught me to listen, understand needs quickly and simplify choices.
coffee.highlightCoffeeLine: Now I bring that mindset into tech
coffee.coffeeDescPart2: focusing on a digital customer experience and building interfaces that feel as friendly and intuitive as a good coffee shop.
